info.title: Nuvo Webhooks v0.0.5
info.description:
# Overview

Nuvo emits HTTP POST webhook events to customer-configured endpoints when specific events occur in the credit application system. This enables real-time event-driven integrations without polling.

## Webhook Event Types

Every webhook Nuvo emits delivers the **same payload shape**; only the `eventType` field differs. Inspect `eventType` to dispatch on the event:

| `eventType`                          | Fires when                                                       |
|--------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `CREDIT_APP_NEW`                     | A buyer submits a new credit application.                        |
| `CREDIT_LIMIT_CHANGE`                | A credit limit is modified for an existing customer.             |
| `CREDIT_APP_STATUS_CHANGE`           | An application's review status changes (approval, rejection, …). |
| `CUSTOMER_APP_SIGNATURE_REQUESTED`   | A signature is requested on a customer application.              |
| `MANUAL`                             | A webhook is manually triggered (testing or special cases).      |

## Request Format

- **Method**: POST
- **Content-Type**: application/json
- **Timeout**: 10 seconds (your endpoint must respond within this time)
- **Schema version**: `0.0.5` (latest is `0.0.9`; check `webhookVersion` in the payload)

**reviewStatus values**: `INCOMPLETE_APPLICATION`, `ACTIVE_ACCOUNT`, `PLACEHOLDER_APPLICATION`, `INCOMPLETE_ACCOUNT`, `APPLICATION`, `PLACEHOLDER_ACCOUNT`, `REMOVED_ACCOUNT`, `REVIEW_ACCOUNT`, `REJECTED_APPLICATION`

**Business type values**: `SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP`, `PARTNERSHIP`, `LLC`, `COOPERATIVE`, `C_CORP`, `S_CORP`, `NON_PROFIT_ORGANIZATION`, `PUBLIC_AGENCY`

## Authentication & Security

Every webhook includes cryptographic signatures to verify authenticity:

**Headers:**

- `X-NUVO-CERT-URL`: https://www.nuvo.com/assets/webhook_public_key.pub
- `X-NUVO-SIGNATURE`: Base64-encoded ECDSA signature

**Algorithm Details:**

- Signature: ECDSA with curve secp384r1 (NIST P-384)
- Hash: SHA-256 of the JSON payload
- Encoding: ASN.1 DER format, Base64 encoded

A Node.js verification example is included as a code sample on every event below.

## Error Handling & Retry Logic

- **Maximum attempts**: 10 retries over ~13 hours
- **Backoff strategy**: Exponential backoff (90 seconds base, doubles each retry)
- **Retry triggers**: Any non-200 HTTP status, network failures, timeouts
- **Idempotency**: Use `eventUuid` to detect and skip duplicate events

After maximum retries, the webhook is marked as failed but your webhook remains active for future events.

## Monitoring & Troubleshooting

Once webhooks are enabled, you'll have access to a **Webhook Logs** tab in your Nuvo customer profile showing:

- **All webhook deliveries** with timestamps and status
- **Complete payloads** sent to your endpoint
- **Your endpoint responses** (status codes, headers, response body)
- **Retry attempts** and failure details

### Common Issues

1. **Webhooks not arriving**: Check your endpoint URL and firewall settings
2. **Timeouts**: Ensure your endpoint responds within 10 seconds
3. **Signature failures**: Verify you're using the correct public key and algorithm
4. **Duplicate processing**: Use `eventUuid` for deduplication

## Development & Testing

- **Use Nuvo's testing portal** (under Settings → Integrations)
- **Custom fields**: Two sections contain configurable fields that affect payload structure:
    - `additionalFieldResponses`: Custom credit application questions and responses
    - `internalFieldsValues`: Internal fields configured between supplier and Nuvo

post.description:
Nuvo POSTs this payload to your configured webhook endpoint when any
of the supported events fires. Inspect `eventType` to dispatch on the
event, and use `eventUuid` for idempotency.

uspsValidated.title: Uspsvalidated
uspsValidated.description: Whether the address has been USPS-validated.

addressType.title: Addresstype
addressType.description: Residential vs. business classification of the address.

recordType.title: Recordtype
recordType.description: USPS record type code from Smarty metadata.

name.title: Name
name.description: Applicant's full name as supplied on the application.

title.title: Title
title.description: Applicant's job title at the buyer company.

createdAt.title: Createdat
createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the asset was attached.

url.title: Url
url.description: Signed URL for downloading the asset.

taxId.title: Taxid
taxId.description: Buyer tax identifier (e.g., EIN for US entities).

stateOfIncorporation.title: Stateofincorporation
stateOfIncorporation.description: Two-letter US state code where the buyer is incorporated.

businessType.title: Businesstype
businessType.description: One of SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP, PARTNERSHIP, LLC, COOPERATIVE, C_CORP, S_CORP, NON_PROFIT_ORGANIZATION, PUBLIC_AGENCY.

accountsPayableEmailAddress.title: Accountspayableemailaddress
accountsPayableEmailAddress.description: Email address for the buyer's accounts payable team.

accountsPayablePhoneNumber.title: Accountspayablephonenumber
accountsPayablePhoneNumber.description: Phone number for the buyer's accounts payable team.

billingAddress.title: Billingaddress
billingAddress.description: Address invoices and statements should be sent to.

statementsInvoicesEmail.title: Statementsinvoicesemail
statementsInvoicesEmail.description: Email address where statements and invoices should be delivered.

poRequired.title: Porequired
poRequired.description: Whether the buyer requires a purchase order on every invoice.

internalId.title: Internalid
internalId.description: Customer-supplied internal id assigned to this buyer.

ownersOfficersSignatories.title: Ownersofficerssignatories
ownersOfficersSignatories.description: Owners, officers, and authorized signatories for the buyer.

isVerified.title: Isverified
isVerified.description: Whether this buyer has been identity-verified.

secretaryOfState.title: Secretaryofstate
secretaryOfState.description: Secretary of State registration data for the buyer.

organizationBusinessAddress.title: Organizationbusinessaddress
organizationBusinessAddress.description: Address registered with the buyer's organizing jurisdiction.

applicantInformation.title: Applicantinformation
applicantInformation.description: Information about the person who submitted the application.

nextReviewDate.title: Nextreviewdate
nextReviewDate.description: ISO 8601 date for the next scheduled review.

taxDocumentLinks.title: Taxdocumentlinks
taxDocumentLinks.description: Signed URLs for tax documents (e.g., W-9) attached to the application.

defaultCreditLimit.title: Defaultcreditlimit
defaultCreditLimit.description: Approved credit limit for this buyer, in `creditLimitCurrency`.

defaultCreditTerms.title: Defaultcreditterms
defaultCreditTerms.description: Default credit terms applied to this buyer (e.g., 'NET 30').

additionalFieldResponses.title: Additionalfieldresponses
additionalFieldResponses.description: Responses to custom credit application questions.

internalFieldsValues.title: Internalfieldsvalues
internalFieldsValues.description: Internal field values, organized as {section_key: {field_key: value}}.

dashboardUrl.title: Dashboardurl
dashboardUrl.description: Link to view this application in the Nuvo dashboard.

businessLocations.title: Businesslocations
businessLocations.description: Additional business locations supplied on the application.

salesRepresentatives.title: Salesrepresentatives
salesRepresentatives.description: Sales representatives assigned to this buyer.

flow.title: Flow
flow.description: Configuration slug used for this application.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Notes attached to the application by users or the system.

signatures.title: Signatures
signatures.description: Signatures captured during the application flow.

referenceId.title: Referenceid
referenceId.description: Reference id supplied by the customer when the application was created.

createdAt.title: Createdat
createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the note was created.

isSystemNote.title: Issystemnote
isSystemNote.description: True if the note was generated by Nuvo rather than a human user.

eventUuid.title: Eventuuid
eventUuid.description: Unique id for this delivery. Use for idempotency.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Customer-supplied metadata associated with the application.

buyer.title: Buyer
buyer.description: Buyer company associated with the application, if available.

creditApplication.title: Creditapplication
creditApplication.description: The credit application this event is about.

jobTitle.title: Jobtitle
jobTitle.description: Job title or role at the buyer company.

isVerified.title: Isverified
isVerified.description: Whether this person has verified their identity.

ReviewStatus.title: ReviewStatus
ReviewStatus.description:
A Review Status tracks the state of information submitted from one company to another.
The most prominent example of this is Customer Applications, where buyers submit information to suppliers. Suppliers can use this information to onboard and manage the buyer (their customer).

Review Statuses follow these principles:
- Bidirectional visibility and transparency: both sides see the same status
- Certain actions can change the status, and there is a well defined state machine that governs these transitions.
- See `knowledge/review_status_state_machine.md` for more details.

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.description: Optional display nickname for the sales representative.

registeredNames.title: Registerednames
registeredNames.description: Business names registered with the Secretary of State.

title.title: Title
title.description: Signer's job title at the buyer company.

customSignatureKey.title: Customsignaturekey
customSignatureKey.description: Identifier for custom signature blocks (only present when kind='CUSTOM').
